name_cn:
Burberry [8871] Large
Exquisite 'Title - Teller Handbag', crafted from selected vintage check pieces, accented with smooth leather trim and three rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with a detachable strap. 32 x 15 x 25cm
